Name: More More More Performance! (T3MP)
Description: Make Timberborn's simulation actually run FASTER at high game speed - a real, algorithmic way to optimize the CPU-bound sim, NOT a speed multiplier. More More More Performance! (T3MP) rebuilds the heaviest hot paths (tick dispatch, hauling, pathfinding / travel-time estimates, need decisions, water) so large late-game colonies and fast-forward keep up. Measured per full in-game day on a large colony: about 1.5x the unmodded tick rate always on; up to ~2.4x with the optional Shift+P animation-skip turbo (the exact factor depends on your CPU and the game's population speed cap). BIGGEST FELT CHANGE: it removes the game's HIDDEN population speed throttle. Vanilla quietly shrinks any speed above x1 as your colony grows (effective = 1 + (pressed - 1) x 0.4 at 200+ beavers), so on a big colony x3 really runs x1.8 and x7 runs x3.4 - and the game never tells you. With this mod the speed you press is the speed you get. Beyond that it does NOT change game speed - keep using the base game's speed controls or any speed mod; this makes those actually deliver instead of stuttering. Behavior-identical to vanilla: pathfinding, reservations, inventories and water are never skipped or approximated, so you get the exact same colony. [JP] シミュ自体を速くする本物の最適化mod。速度の倍率を変えるのではなく、CPUがボトルネックになっている計算を軽くして、高速再生や大規模コロニーが本当に速く（faster）回るようにします。体感で一番効くのはバニラの「隠れ人口速度制限」の撤廃：バニラはコロニーが育つと1倍を超える速度分を勝手に縮小します（200人以上で 実効=1+(押した速度−1)×0.4。x3→実質x1.8、x7→x3.4、しかも無告知）。本modでは押した速度がそのまま通ります。それ以外の挙動はバニラと完全一致（経路・予約・在庫・水を一切省略・近似しない）ので結果は同じ。常時約1.5倍、Shift+Pのアニメーションskipで最大約2.4倍（CPUと人口速度上限に依存）。keywords: performance, speed, faster, optimize, optimization, lag, fps, late game, large colony, tick rate.
